outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH: Negative GEX amplifies moves; reverse skew confirms bullish momentum

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday volatility due to positive 0DTE GEX, but potential acceleration if spot breaks below 23600. Mixed term structure creates cross-currents.
outlook.summary: Spot hovers just above the 0DTE Gamma Flip at 23745 with positive intraday GEX (+0.20B) suggesting dealer stability. However, the longer-term structure shows negative GEX (-0.40B combined) indicating underlying fragility. The reverse smirk skew on 0DTE (0.46 ratio) signals aggressive call buying and bullish euphoria, contrasting with the monthly smirk (1.21) showing hedging activity. Max Pain cluster at 24200-24400 provides magnetic pull upward. Immediate battleground is the 23800 level where RESONANCE PUT support across all expiries creates a structural floor. High-volume put activity at 23600 (2911 vol/73 OI = 40x ratio) suggests aggressive downside hedging - watch for dealer pinning.

levels.motivazione: Identical strike across all 3 expiries (0DTE 46 OI, WEEKLY 53 OI, MONTHLY 242 OI). Dealers defending this level with concentrated gamma exposure. Spot at 23810 is testing this support.
0DTE gamma inflection point. Positive GEX above this level stabilizes price action. Break below triggers negative gamma feedback loop with dealer selling pressure.

Cluster of Max Pain levels: 0DTE 24200, MONTHLY 24300. Dealer target zone where option value minimizes. Magnetic attraction for expiry.
Identical strike across all 3 expiries: 0DTE 88 OI, WEEKLY 58 OI, MONTHLY 295 OI. Major dealer ceiling with concentrated call gamma. Ultimate resistance zone.
